description_long: This object is a compact, modern firearm with a distinctive bullpup configuration, featuring a matte black finish and a streamlined, ergonomic body. The main body is constructed from a combination of metal and polymer, with a prominent integrated sight rail on top and a large, rounded trigger guard that merges smoothly into the grip. The grip itself is contoured with a smooth surface and an open, circular cutout, providing a unique and comfortable hold. The magazine is housed behind the grip, contributing to the weapon's compact profile, and the barrel is short and recessed within the body. The overall design is sleek and tactical, with minimal external markings and a focus on functionality and ease of handling.
description: A compact, matte black bullpup firearm with a streamlined body, integrated sight rail, and ergonomic grip featuring a circular cutout. The design is sleek, modern, and tactical, with minimal external markings.
description_view_0: The object is seen from the front, showing the barrel opening, integrated sight, and the symmetrical, compact profile.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the full length of the firearm, the ergonomic grip with a circular cutout, the integrated sight rail, and the magazine area behind the grip.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the stock, the back of the sight rail, and the overall width of the firearm.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing the grip, trigger guard, sight rail, and the magazine housing, with subtle differences in surface details.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is contoured and integrated into the main body, featuring a smooth, matte black polymer surface with a large, circular cutout for ergonomic finger placement. The design is minimalist, lacking visible texturing or checkering, and appears to prioritize comfort and control. There are no visible logos or embellishments, and the grip seamlessly merges with the trigger guard for a unified appearance.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is oversized and rounded, forming a continuous curve with the grip and featuring a large open space for easy finger access. It is thick and robust, with a smooth finish and no visible reinforcement or texturing. The design is distinctive, providing ample room and a unique visual profile compared to standard trigger guards.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and recessed within the main body, with a smooth, unadorned exterior and no visible threading, porting, or compensators. It is integrated into the bullpup design, and the finish matches the matte black of the rest of the firearm. No external markings or special features are visible on the barrel.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the slide or upper receiver. The surface is smooth and unmarked, contributing to the firearm's minimalist and tactical appearance.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is not prominently visible, but the design suggests a flush, flat base that aligns with the compact, streamlined profile of the firearm. There are no visible finger rests, flares, or logos, and the base appears to be integrated smoothly into the body without additional embellishments.
